name: Fluffball
author: Poki
description:
Fluffball is a fun skill game where you play as a very slippy fluffy ball. You will need precision and anticipation to not fall out of the map ! Beware of speeddy turns ! Let nothing stop you in your quest of clearing all levels ! Fluffball is developed by Nitrome. Every level has different challenges. The game has remained to be popular to this day! Enjoy your fluffy adventures here on Poki! {"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[ {"@type":"Question","name":"How to play Fluffball?", "acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Roll your way to the end of the level without falling ! Move - WASD or Arrow Keys "}}, {"@type":"Question","name":"Who created Fluffball?", "acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Fluffball was created by Nitrome as a flash game, and later emulated in HTML5 by AwayFL.
